title: 아침 브리핑
subtitle: 날씨 · 응원 · 일정 · 메일 · 유튜브 · 시스템 · OpenClaw
summary: 비어 있는 하루는 느슨한 하루가 아니라, 진짜 필요한 걸 선명하게 끝낼 수 있는 하루입니다.
summary_box: 습도가 높아 체감이 더 무겁습니다. 물을 자주 마시며 리듬을 유지하면 좋겠습니다. 오늘은 마음을 급하게 쓰지 말고, 가장 아쉬웠던 한 가지를 먼저 정리해 보시면 좋겠습니다. 그런 작은 정리가 하루의 기분을 꽤 크게 바꿉니다.

weather.life_comment: 습도가 높아 체감이 더 무겁습니다. 물을 자주 마시며 리듬을 유지하면 좋겠습니다.

calendar.take: 오늘 등록된 일정이 없습니다. 이럴 때는 중요한 정리 한두 개만 분명하게 끝내도 충분합니다.

mail.take: 지금 확인할 만한 메일만 추렸습니다. 결제, 업무, 보안성 알림 위주로 먼저 보면 됩니다.

items.subject: Google 계정 데이터 일부를 VideoMasker에 공유하셨습니다

youtube.summary: @JulianGoldieSEO NEW ChatGPT 5.6 Models a / @fahdmirza GPT-5.6 Sol vs Claude Fa / @JulianGoldieSEO NEW Hermes Agent OS just
youtube.take: 업로드 속도가 빠른 채널은 오늘도 여러 편이 들어왔습니다. 중요한 주제부터 2~3개만 골라 보면 효율이 좋습니다.

items.title: NEW ChatGPT 5.6 Models are INSANE!
items.summary: 이 영상은 모델/LLM, 에이전트/자동화 중심 내용입니다. New chat GPT 5.6 models are insane, Soul, Terra, Luna explained What if the newest AI from OpenAI quietly turned into three AIs at once, not one [music] model, three of them One is fast, one is the everyday pick, one is a total beast
items.transcript_excerpt: New chat GPT 5.6 models are insane, Soul, Terra, Luna explained. What if the newest AI from OpenAI quietly turned into three AIs at once, not one [music] model, three of them. And most people have no clue which one they should be using. One

items.title: GPT-5.6 Sol vs Claude Fable 5 — One Prompt, No Mercy
items.summary: 이 영상은 모델/LLM 중심 내용입니다. 구성은 🔥 Buy Me a Coffee to support the channel: PLEASE FOLLOW ME: ▶ LinkedIn: ▶ YouTube: ▶ Blog: RESOURCES: ▶ All rights reserved © Fahd Mirza 순서로 이어집니다. Open-source openweight premodels That whole wave has basically stalled Meanwhile, the two biggest closed labs are doing the opposite
items.description_excerpt: Both labs claim they're number one, so I gave Claude Fable 5 and GPT-5.6 Sol one brutally hard prompt, a rotating döner kebab with real fire physics and fluid dynamics, and let the code decide who's actually lying. 🔥 Buy Me a Coffee to support the channel: PLEASE FOLLOW ME: ▶ LinkedIn: ▶ YouTube: ▶ Blog: RESOURCES: ▶ All rights reserved © Fahd Mirza
items.transcript_excerpt: Open-source openweight premodels. That whole wave has basically stalled. Almost no major open releases lately. Meanwhile, the two biggest closed labs are doing the opposite. Enthropic and open AI are both shipping new model generations back

items.title: NEW Hermes Agent OS just changed Everything!
items.summary: 이 영상은 모델/LLM, 에이전트/자동화, 수익화/마케팅 중심 내용입니다. 구성은 Intro to Hermes Agent OS, How Sub-Agent Teams Work, Automated Content Creation Example, Step-by-Step Setup Guide 순서로 이어집니다. New Hermes Agent OS just changed everything It's new, it's big, and it's so easy 99% of people don't even know this is possible, and I'm going to show you how to build it step-by-step today
items.description_excerpt: Get the Agent OS 👉 00:00 - Intro to Hermes Agent OS 00:40 - How Sub-Agent Teams Work 01:11 - Automated Content Creation Example 02:02 - Step-by-Step Setup Guide 02:52 - Managing AI Tokens and Costs 03:43 - The Memory Galaxy Second Brain 04:50 - Selling Agent OS to Clients 05:39 - Grok 4.5 and New AI Models
items.transcript_excerpt: New Hermes Agent OS just changed everything. It's new, it's big, and it's so easy. You get a whole AI system that runs your business while you sleep. 99% of people don't even know this is possible, and I'm going to show you how to build it

items.title: New Google AI Studio Update is INSANE!
items.summary: 이 영상은 모델/LLM, 수익화/마케팅 중심 내용입니다. 구성은 Intro: Huge AI Studio Update, The Problem with AI App URLs, New Custom URL Feature, How to Set Up Your Custom URL 순서로 이어집니다. New Google AI Studio update is insane And yes, this one matters for SEO, too It fixes one of the ugliest problems in AI app building
items.description_excerpt: Get the Google AI Studio Masterclass 👉 00:00 - Intro: Huge AI Studio Update 00:47 - The Problem with AI App URLs 01:52 - New Custom URL Feature 02:09 - How to Set Up Your Custom URL 03:01 - Why Branded Links Boost SEO 05:13 - Pro Naming Tips for AI Apps 06:34 - The Future of No-Code Tools
items.transcript_excerpt: New Google AI Studio update is insane. And yes, this one matters for SEO, too. Today, I'm going to show you the new tool Google just dropped inside AI Studio. It fixes one of the ugliest problems in AI app building. It's free, it's live rig

items.title: IT뉴스 - GPT-5.6, GPT‑Live, Work, Grok 4.5, Muse Spark 1.1, Lingbot-World-2, Google 커스텀 URL 등
items.summary: 이 영상은 모델/LLM, 개발도구 중심 내용입니다. 구성은 IT뉴스 - GPT-5.6, GPT‑Live, Work, Grok 4.5, Muse Spark 1.1, Lingbot-World-2, Google 커스텀 URL 등 조코딩과 코딩 공부하기 제보 메일: jebo .net 순서로 이어집니다. IT뉴스 - GPT-5.6, GPT‑Live, Work, Grok 4.5, Muse Spark 1.1, Lingbot-World-2, Google 커스텀 URL 등 조코딩과 코딩 공부하기 제보 메일: jebo .net
